base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of enemy_explosion_blue_challenging — a effect_layer (explosion_vfx) from 1981 galaga. Alternate 4-frame blue explosion — variant used for challenging-stage enemies or special-hit cases. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
